calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
Petitioner: Chun Mei Li, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jia Xi Xu, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Jenny Yau.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No appearance by Co-Petitioner/Minor's Father: Hai Jiang Xu, but signed the Petition consenting to the name change of the minor.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Annie Jiaxi Xu.
Decree signed in open court.
